title: Morning Routines of Successful People

segments.text: What you do in the first hour after you wake up shapes the rest of your day.
They move their body, even if only for ten minutes.
They write down three things they want to accomplish.
None of these habits are magic on their own, but together they build momentum.

transcript: What you do in the first hour after you wake up shapes the rest of your day. Many high-performers share similar habits. They get up early. They drink water before coffee. They move their body, even if only for ten minutes. They write down three things they want to accomplish. None of these habits are magic on their own, but together they build momentum.
